claims: TaxKit current navigation no longer contradicts accepted HGI-206: the SPEC is implemented, the plan is historical under completed, no plan is active, and requalification routes to the accepted validation receipt.
Harness effectiveness now records the lifecycle route as revised while retaining the journey, runbook, skill and lint interventions and leaving causal comparison inconclusive.
The correction is documentation lifecycle only and preserves the accepted HGI-206 target-specific epoch, failures, limitations and non-claims.

checks.command: bun run test:skills; bun run check:docs; bun run check:runbooks; bun run check:repository-paths; git diff --cached --check
checks.observedPostcondition: Sixteen skill tests passed; documentation policy passed over 659 tracked files; four runbooks and ten commands passed without execution; 651 text and eight binary paths passed portability; the staged diff had no whitespace errors.

Repository path/type checks, quality workflow, documentation and runbook contracts, Effect language service, lint, formatting over 434 files, 16 skill tests, 10 quality-workflow tests including six isolated release-boundary mutations, both Knip graphs, and 23 Turbo type/build tasks passed.

checks.command: git commit -m 'docs: close TaxKit harness lifecycle'; git rev-parse HEAD HEAD^{tree}; git status --short --branch
checks.observedPostcondition: The semantic tree is committed at 7a381605ea0bcecad0231d2ebf36394e91881349 with tree 31df17e8d874b3adcef35143ca47446bd078d972; local main is one commit ahead of origin/main before this validation closeout.

retainedFailures.command: bun run test:skills && bun run check:docs && bun run check:runbooks && bun run check:repository-paths && git diff --check
retainedFailures.observedState: Before the explicit rename was staged, the Git-index-backed documentation policy still inventoried the deleted active-plan path and reported five missing-frontmatter violations.
retainedFailures.recovery: The exact correction paths were staged, making the intended plan move visible to the policy; the same focused checks and full verification then passed.
retainedFailures.nonClaim: The failed pre-stage run is retained as orchestration/lifecycle evidence and is not a successful documentation receipt.

rollback: Revert this validation closeout, then semantic commit 7a381605ea0bcecad0231d2ebf36394e91881349; preserve the original HGI-206 candidate, validation, results, failed evidence, and this correction provenance.
limitations: The correction proves repository-local lifecycle and verification only; it does not widen the accepted HGI-206 epoch.
The HGI-400 cross-repository contract must use a new TaxKit target identity and recomputed fixture/projection digests before any worker dispatch.
nonClaims: No HGI-400 worker, grader, causal comparison, variance result, or permanent worker qualification is established.
No version, tag, hosted release, registry publication, deployment, provider, credential, public-site, recovery, or external-consumer state was read, changed, or established.
postcondition: The accepted HGI-206 outcome, current routers, implemented SPEC, completed plan route, epoch/effectiveness owners, candidate, and validation evidence agree on repository-local completion.
